programs.name: A Journey from Acrylics to Oils
programs.description: This introductory–intermediate course is for beginners and experienced painters who want to explore oil painting using water-mixable oils. Often seen as intimidating or toxic, oil painting becomes safe and accessible in this class. Students will learn layering, glazing, and composition while building confidence and personal expression.

programs.name: Abstract & Surreal Landscapes
programs.description: Move  beyond traditional depictions of nature and explore more abstract, expressive  approaches to landscape. Through painting, drawing, and sketching, discover how  colour, shape and composition can capture the spirit and emotion of a place  rather than its literal form. Experiment with layering, mark-making and dynamic  brushwork to translate the emotional and atmospheric qualities of the natural  world into an abstract visual language.

programs.name: Abstract Acrylic Painting: Composition
programs.description: Express yourself with paint with a focus on abstract composition. Experiment with novel ways of applying acrylic paint on canvas, such as squeegee paint, drip and splatter, flow painting and mixed media collage. Delve into the history of abstract painting, and the elements and principles of composition. Beginners and Intermediate welcome. Materials list will be provided.

programs.name: Adapted Active8
programs.description: With a variety of activities to enjoy, Active8 will keep you moving. Join us for co-operative games, arts, sports, basic cooking, swimming, physical activity workshops, community walks and more.Participants must have a current AIS membership. To register, contact the AIS Hotline at 416-395-6128 or email aiscw@toronto.ca.

Experiment with novel ways of applying acrylic paint on canvas, such as squeegee paint, drip and splatter, flow painting and mixed media collage. Delve into the history of abstract painting, and the elements and principles of composition. Beginners and Intermediate welcome. Materials list will be provided.

programs.name: Adapted Active8
programs.description: With a variety of activities to enjoy, Active8 will keep you moving. Join us for co-operative games, arts, sports, basic cooking, swimming, physical activity workshops, community walks and more.Participants must have a current AIS membership. To register, contact the AIS Hotline at 416-395-6128 or email aiscw@toronto.ca.

programs.name: A Journey from Acrylics to Oils
programs.description: This introductory–intermediate course is for beginners and experienced painters who want to explore oil painting using water-mixable oils. Often seen as intimidating or toxic, oil painting becomes safe and accessible in this class. Students will learn layering, glazing, and composition while building confidence and personal expression.

programs.name: Abstract & Surreal Landscapes
programs.description: Move  beyond traditional depictions of nature and explore more abstract, expressive  approaches to landscape. Through painting, drawing, and sketching, discover how  colour, shape and composition can capture the spirit and emotion of a place  rather than its literal form. Experiment with layering, mark-making and dynamic  brushwork to translate the emotional and atmospheric qualities of the natural  world into an abstract visual language.

Join us for co-operative games, arts, sports, basic cooking, swimming, physical activity workshops, community walks and more.Participants must have a current AIS membership. To register, contact the AIS Hotline at 416-395-6128 or email aiscw@toronto.ca.

programs.name: A Journey from Acrylics to Oils
programs.description: This introductory–intermediate course is for beginners and experienced painters who want to explore oil painting using water-mixable oils. Often seen as intimidating or toxic, oil painting becomes safe and accessible in this class. Students will learn layering, glazing, and composition while building confidence and personal expression.

programs.name: Abstract & Surreal Landscapes
programs.description: Move  beyond traditional depictions of nature and explore more abstract, expressive  approaches to landscape. Through painting, drawing, and sketching, discover how  colour, shape and composition can capture the spirit and emotion of a place  rather than its literal form. Experiment with layering, mark-making and dynamic  brushwork to translate the emotional and atmospheric qualities of the natural  world into an abstract visual language.

programs.name: Abstract Acrylic Painting: Composition
programs.description: Express yourself with paint with a focus on abstract composition. Experiment with novel ways of applying acrylic paint on canvas, such as squeegee paint, drip and splatter, flow painting and mixed media collage. Delve into the history of abstract painting, and the elements and principles of composition. Beginners and Intermediate welcome. Materials list will be provided.

programs.name: A Journey from Acrylics to Oils
programs.description: This introductory–intermediate course is for beginners and experienced painters who want to explore oil painting using water-mixable oils. Often seen as intimidating or toxic, oil painting becomes safe and accessible in this class. Students will learn layering, glazing, and composition while building confidence and personal expression.

programs.name: Abstract & Surreal Landscapes
programs.description: Move  beyond traditional depictions of nature and explore more abstract, expressive  approaches to landscape. Through painting, drawing, and sketching, discover how  colour, shape and composition can capture the spirit and emotion of a place  rather than its literal form. Experiment with layering, mark-making and dynamic  brushwork to translate the emotional and atmospheric qualities of the natural  world into an abstract visual language.

programs.name: Abstract Acrylic Painting: Composition
programs.description: Express yourself with paint with a focus on abstract composition. Experiment with novel ways of applying acrylic paint on canvas, such as squeegee paint, drip and splatter, flow painting and mixed media collage. Delve into the history of abstract painting, and the elements and principles of composition. Beginners and Intermediate welcome. Materials list will be provided.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 2
programs.description: Jump into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front swim, back kicks and glides. Learn how to stay afloat in deep water, side glide and kicking. Work towards a continuous swim of five metres.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 1 or Preschool Swim  3.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 3
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop staying afloat in deep water, side glide and kicking. Learn front crawl, diving and back swim. Work towards a continuous swim of 10 meters. Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 2 or Preschool Swim 4.

programs.name: Dance: Creative Movement with Caregiver
programs.description: Express yourself creatively with dance. Pairing basic movements with imagination, learn dance elements like body awareness and rhythm through a variety of exercises and engaging choreography. A caregiver must actively participate in this activity.

programs.name: Basketball: Instructional
programs.description: Instructional sports programs are designed to introduce sport-specific skills while improving fundamental movement with agility, balance and coordination. In basketball, you will learn basics like passing, dribbling, layups and shooting as well as game rules through drills, practice and play.

programs.name: Basketball: Instructional (Boys)
programs.description: Instructional sports programs are designed to introduce sport-specific skills while improving fundamental movement with agility, balance and coordination. In basketball, you will learn basics like passing, dribbling, layups and shooting as well as game rules through drills, practice and play. This activity is for all boys.

programs.name: Basketball: Instructional (Girls)
programs.description: Instructional sports programs are designed to introduce sport-specific skills while improving fundamental movement with agility, balance and coordination. In basketball, you will learn basics like passing, dribbling, layups and shooting as well as game rules through drills, practice and play. This activity is for all girls.

programs.name: Basketball: Instructional (Girls)
programs.description: Instructional sports programs are designed to introduce sport-specific skills while improving fundamental movement with agility, balance and coordination. In basketball, you will learn basics like passing, dribbling, layups and shooting as well as game rules through drills, practice and play. This activity is for all girls.

programs.name: Bronze Star and Basic First Aid (CPR A)
programs.description: This course develops swimming proficiency, lifesaving skill and personal fitness. Candidates refine their stroke mechanics, acquire self-rescue skills, and apply fitness principles in training workouts. Bronze Star is excellent preparation for success in Bronze Medallion and provides a fun introduction to lifesaving sport.Prerequisite: Minimum age of 9 years old.

programs.name: Cooking
programs.description: Let’s get creative in the kitchen and have some fun. In this introduction to cooking, you will learn about healthy foods, the importance of safety and practice basic skills like mixing and measuring with easy-to-follow recipes that taste great.The City of Toronto and its staff cannot guarantee that the foods or supplies within its cooking programs are free of allergens. Notify staff at your location of any food allergies or dietary restrictions you may have.

programs.name: Cooking: Baking
programs.description: Whether you are making breads, desserts or pastries; something savoury or sweet, this activity will help you reach new culinary delights. Come learn the basics of cooking and how to prepare delicious and nutritious recipes inspired by Canada’s Food Guide. From measuring and mixing ingredients to food safety, you will gain confidence in the kitchen.The City of Toronto and its staff cannot guarantee that the foods or supplies within its cooking programs are free of allergens. Notify staff at your location of any food allergies or dietary restrictions you may have.
programs.location: Gord and Irene Risk Cmty Rec Centre

programs.name: Cooking: Creative Chefs
programs.description: Small cooks with big imaginations will have the chance to take over the kitchen. Starting with cooking basics, you will learn about healthy foods and the importance of kitchen safety, then through hands-on practice you will learn how to mix and measure, use cool kitchen tools and follow recipes that explore fun flavours that taste great.The City of Toronto and its staff cannot guarantee that the foods or supplies within its cooking programs are free of allergens. Notify staff at your location of any food allergies or dietary restrictions you may have.

programs.name: Cooking: Vegetarian
programs.description: Get creative with great ingredients like fruits, vegetables and grains. Come learn the basics of cooking and how to prepare delicious and nutritious recipes inspired by Canada’s Food Guide. From measuring and mixing ingredients to food safety, you will gain comfort in the kitchen.The City of Toronto and its staff cannot guarantee that the foods or supplies within its cooking programs are free of allergens. Notify staff at your location of any food allergies or dietary restrictions you may have.

programs.name: Dance: Ballet
programs.description: This classic style of dance is all about graceful movements. Learn basic ballet positions, postures and proper technique through various exercises and engaging choreography.

programs.name: Dance: Basics
programs.description: Combining influences of lyrical, jazz, ballet, hip hop and modern dance this activity is the perfect for beginners. Learn basic positions, body awareness and proper technique through a variety of exercises and engaging choreography.

programs.name: Dance: Hip Hop
programs.description: Hip Hop is a street dance that uses strong, fast and fluid movements. Learn basic steps like body rolls, contractions, bounces and waves through a variety of exercises and engaging choreography.

programs.name: Dance: Hip Hop
programs.description: Hip Hop is a street dance that uses strong, fast and fluid movements. Learn basic steps like body rolls, contractions, bounces and waves through a variety of exercises and engaging choreography.

programs.name: Drama
programs.description: Here's an early introduction to the stage and performance art. Through dramatic play and skits learn to express emotion with your body, face and voice, to improve your performing arts skills.

programs.name: Drama
programs.description: Here's an early introduction to the stage and performance art. Through dramatic play and skits learn to express emotion with your body, face and voice, to improve your performing arts skills.
programs.location: Topham Park Cmty Centre and Clubhouse

programs.name: Music: Drumming - Private
programs.description: Would you benefit from private music lessons? This activity provides personal instruction on the drum with a one-on-one ratio. Here you will learn grip, stroke, rhythm and hand and foot coordination.

programs.name: Music: Keyboard
programs.description: Fun and fundamentals shape this introduction to keyboarding. Here you will learn proper hand positions, basic scales and how to read notes. As you continue to practice and learn how to read music you will work towards performing simple pieces.

programs.name: Abstract & Surreal Landscapes
programs.description: Move  beyond traditional depictions of nature and explore more abstract, expressive  approaches to landscape. Through painting, drawing, and sketching, discover how  colour, shape and composition can capture the spirit and emotion of a place  rather than its literal form. Experiment with layering, mark-making and dynamic  brushwork to translate the emotional and atmospheric qualities of the natural  world into an abstract visual language.

programs.name: Abstract Acrylic Painting: Composition
programs.description: Express yourself with paint with a focus on abstract composition. Experiment with novel ways of applying acrylic paint on canvas, such as squeegee paint, drip and splatter, flow painting and mixed media collage. Delve into the history of abstract painting, and the elements and principles of composition. Beginners and Intermediate welcome. Materials list will be provided.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 2
programs.description: Jump into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop front swim, back kicks and glides. Learn how to stay afloat in deep water, side glide and kicking. Work towards a continuous swim of five metres.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 1 or Preschool Swim  3.

programs.name: Ultra Swim 3
programs.description: Dive into lessons to improve your swim skills. Develop staying afloat in deep water, side glide and kicking. Learn front crawl, diving and back swim. Work towards a continuous swim of 10 meters. Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Ultra Swim 2 or Preschool Swim 4.

programs.name: Dance: Creative Movement with Caregiver
programs.description: Express yourself creatively with dance. Pairing basic movements with imagination, learn dance elements like body awareness and rhythm through a variety of exercises and engaging choreography. A caregiver must actively participate in this activity.

programs.name: Basketball: Instructional
programs.description: Instructional sports programs are designed to introduce sport-specific skills while improving fundamental movement with agility, balance and coordination. In basketball, you will learn basics like passing, dribbling, layups and shooting as well as game rules through drills, practice and play.

programs.name: Basketball: Instructional (Boys)
programs.description: Instructional sports programs are designed to introduce sport-specific skills while improving fundamental movement with agility, balance and coordination. In basketball, you will learn basics like passing, dribbling, layups and shooting as well as game rules through drills, practice and play. This activity is for all boys.

programs.name: Basketball: Instructional (Girls)
programs.description: Instructional sports programs are designed to introduce sport-specific skills while improving fundamental movement with agility, balance and coordination. In basketball, you will learn basics like passing, dribbling, layups and shooting as well as game rules through drills, practice and play. This activity is for all girls.

programs.name: Basketball: Instructional (Girls)
programs.description: Instructional sports programs are designed to introduce sport-specific skills while improving fundamental movement with agility, balance and coordination. In basketball, you will learn basics like passing, dribbling, layups and shooting as well as game rules through drills, practice and play. This activity is for all girls.

programs.name: Bronze Star and Basic First Aid (CPR A)
programs.description: This course develops swimming proficiency, lifesaving skill and personal fitness. Candidates refine their stroke mechanics, acquire self-rescue skills, and apply fitness principles in training workouts. Bronze Star is excellent preparation for success in Bronze Medallion and provides a fun introduction to lifesaving sport.Prerequisite: Minimum age of 9 years old.

programs.name: Cooking
programs.description: Let’s get creative in the kitchen and have some fun. In this introduction to cooking, you will learn about healthy foods, the importance of safety and practice basic skills like mixing and measuring with easy-to-follow recipes that taste great.The City of Toronto and its staff cannot guarantee that the foods or supplies within its cooking programs are free of allergens. Notify staff at your location of any food allergies or dietary restrictions you may have.

programs.name: Cooking: Baking
programs.description: Whether you are making breads, desserts or pastries; something savoury or sweet, this activity will help you reach new culinary delights. Come learn the basics of cooking and how to prepare delicious and nutritious recipes inspired by Canada’s Food Guide. From measuring and mixing ingredients to food safety, you will gain confidence in the kitchen.The City of Toronto and its staff cannot guarantee that the foods or supplies within its cooking programs are free of allergens. Notify staff at your location of any food allergies or dietary restrictions you may have.
programs.location: Gord and Irene Risk Cmty Rec Centre

programs.name: Cooking: Creative Chefs
programs.description: Small cooks with big imaginations will have the chance to take over the kitchen. Starting with cooking basics, you will learn about healthy foods and the importance of kitchen safety, then through hands-on practice you will learn how to mix and measure, use cool kitchen tools and follow recipes that explore fun flavours that taste great.The City of Toronto and its staff cannot guarantee that the foods or supplies within its cooking programs are free of allergens. Notify staff at your location of any food allergies or dietary restrictions you may have.

programs.name: Cooking: Vegetarian
programs.description: Get creative with great ingredients like fruits, vegetables and grains. Come learn the basics of cooking and how to prepare delicious and nutritious recipes inspired by Canada’s Food Guide. From measuring and mixing ingredients to food safety, you will gain comfort in the kitchen.The City of Toronto and its staff cannot guarantee that the foods or supplies within its cooking programs are free of allergens. Notify staff at your location of any food allergies or dietary restrictions you may have.

programs.name: Dance: Ballet
programs.description: This classic style of dance is all about graceful movements. Learn basic ballet positions, postures and proper technique through various exercises and engaging choreography.

programs.name: Dance: Basics
programs.description: Combining influences of lyrical, jazz, ballet, hip hop and modern dance this activity is the perfect for beginners. Learn basic positions, body awareness and proper technique through a variety of exercises and engaging choreography.

programs.name: Dance: Hip Hop
programs.description: Hip Hop is a street dance that uses strong, fast and fluid movements. Learn basic steps like body rolls, contractions, bounces and waves through a variety of exercises and engaging choreography.

programs.name: Dance: Hip Hop
programs.description: Hip Hop is a street dance that uses strong, fast and fluid movements. Learn basic steps like body rolls, contractions, bounces and waves through a variety of exercises and engaging choreography.

programs.name: Drama
programs.description: Here's an early introduction to the stage and performance art. Through dramatic play and skits learn to express emotion with your body, face and voice, to improve your performing arts skills.

programs.name: Drama
programs.description: Here's an early introduction to the stage and performance art. Through dramatic play and skits learn to express emotion with your body, face and voice, to improve your performing arts skills.
programs.location: Topham Park Cmty Centre and Clubhouse

programs.name: Music: Drumming - Private
programs.description: Would you benefit from private music lessons? This activity provides personal instruction on the drum with a one-on-one ratio. Here you will learn grip, stroke, rhythm and hand and foot coordination.

programs.name: Music: Keyboard
programs.description: Fun and fundamentals shape this introduction to keyboarding. Here you will learn proper hand positions, basic scales and how to read notes. As you continue to practice and learn how to read music you will work towards performing simple pieces.

programs.name: A Journey from Acrylics to Oils
programs.description: This introductory–intermediate course is for beginners and experienced painters who want to explore oil painting using water-mixable oils. Often seen as intimidating or toxic, oil painting becomes safe and accessible in this class. Students will learn layering, glazing, and composition while building confidence and personal expression.

programs.name: Abstract & Surreal Landscapes
programs.description: Move  beyond traditional depictions of nature and explore more abstract, expressive  approaches to landscape. Through painting, drawing, and sketching, discover how  colour, shape and composition can capture the spirit and emotion of a place  rather than its literal form. Experiment with layering, mark-making and dynamic  brushwork to translate the emotional and atmospheric qualities of the natural  world into an abstract visual language.

programs.name: Abstract Acrylic Painting: Composition
programs.description: Express yourself with paint with a focus on abstract composition. Experiment with novel ways of applying acrylic paint on canvas, such as squeegee paint, drip and splatter, flow painting and mixed media collage. Delve into the history of abstract painting, and the elements and principles of composition. Beginners and Intermediate welcome. Materials list will be provided.

programs.name: Tai Chi
programs.description: Embrace the body and mind through the practice of tai chi . Learn how to pair gentle movements that you will perform in a sequence with controlled breathing, to improve your flexibility, coordination, strength and mental concentration.

programs.name: Tennis: Instructional
programs.description: Instructional sports activities are designed to introduce sport-specific skills while improving fundamental movement with agility, balance and coordination. In this tennis activity, you will learn basics like serving, forehand and backhand as well as game rules through drills, practice and play.

programs.name: Dance: Line Dance
programs.description: Are you ready to step up your dance skills with line dancing? Using basic steps to create repetitive combinations, you'll learn moves like the shuffle, grapevine, coaster step and mambo step through various exercises and engaging choreography.

programs.name: Dance: Line Dance
programs.description: Are you ready to step up your dance skills with line dancing? Using basic steps to create repetitive combinations, you'll learn moves like the shuffle, grapevine, coaster step and mambo step through various exercises and engaging choreography.

programs.name: Pickleball: Recreational
programs.description: Instructional sports programs are designed to introduce sport-specific skills while improving fundamental movement with agility, balance and coordination. In pickleball, a fast-moving racquet sport that combines elements from tennis, badminton and table tennis, you will learn basics like serving, hitting and rallying as well as game rules through drills, practice and play.

programs.name: Adult Swim 1
programs.description: Build confidence in the water one stroke at a time. Learn front and back swim, front, side and back glides, going underwater, breathing effectively and staying afloat in deep water. Work towards a continuous swim of 25 to 50 metres.

programs.name: Adult Swim 2
programs.description: Build confidence in deep water one stroke at a time. Develop front crawl, back crawl, glides and staying afloat in deep water. Learn stride entry, eggbeater kick and breaststroke. Work towards a continuous swim of 50 to 100 meters. Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Adult Swim 1.

programs.name: Adult Swim 2
programs.description: Build confidence in deep water one stroke at a time. Develop front crawl, back crawl, glides and staying afloat in deep water. Learn stride entry, eggbeater kick and breaststroke. Work towards a continuous swim of 50 to 100 meters. Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Adult Swim 1.

programs.name: Cardio Dance
programs.description: Cardio dance is a dynamic and exciting aerobic workout that anyone can enjoy. With a focus on various culturally inspired music and dance movements and a goal of lifting your heart rate you will dance your way to new fitness heights.

programs.name: Cooking: Baking (Women)
programs.description: Whether you are making breads, desserts or pastries; something savoury or sweet, this activity will help you reach new culinary delights. Come learn the basics of cooking and how to prepare delicious and nutritious recipes inspired by Canada’s Food Guide. From measuring and mixing ingredients to food safety, you will gain confidence in the kitchen.The City of Toronto and its staff cannot guarantee that the foods or supplies within its cooking programs are free of allergens. Notify staff at your location of any food allergies or dietary restrictions you may have.

programs.name: Dance: Line Dance
programs.description: Are you ready to step up your dance skills with line dancing? Using basic steps to create repetitive combinations, you'll learn moves like the shuffle, grapevine, coaster step and mambo step through various exercises and engaging choreography.

programs.name: Dance: Line Dance
programs.description: Are you ready to step up your dance skills with line dancing? Using basic steps to create repetitive combinations, you'll learn moves like the shuffle, grapevine, coaster step and mambo step through various exercises and engaging choreography.

programs.name: Dance: Line Dance
programs.description: Are you ready to step up your dance skills with line dancing? Using basic steps to create repetitive combinations, you'll learn moves like the shuffle, grapevine, coaster step and mambo step through various exercises and engaging choreography.

programs.name: Dance: Line Dance - Advanced
programs.description: Are you ready to step up your dance skills with line dancing? Using basic steps to create repetitive combinations, you'll learn moves like the shuffle, grapevine, coaster step and mambo step through various exercises and engaging choreography.

programs.name: Felting
programs.description: Felting is a unique and long-standing art and craft. In this introductory activity you will learn how to bond fibers together using a combination of techniques such as use of pressure, rolling and with the aid of a needle to create personal works of art.

programs.name: Games: Billiards (Women)
programs.description: From active to interactive and simple to strategic, games are a great way to gain new skills. In billiards, a game played on a table where a cue is used to strike a ball to make a play, you will learn stance, aim, alignment and striking as well as game rules.

programs.name: Gardening
programs.description: Explore the outdoors. With hands-on activities, including projects and games, you will learn about the beauty of nature. This activity will include outdoor components.

programs.name: Guardian Swim 1
programs.description: Swim together to promote confidence and safety in the water. Learn how to enter and exit the pool, go underwater, breathe effectively, and float with assistance. One caregiver per swimmer must participate in the water at all times.

programs.name: Introduction to Memoir Writing
programs.description:
You have a
story to tell! In this five-week introductory workshop, explore the structure
and form of how to approach writing stories from your personal experience with
a goal to consideration of a larger memoir work. In each class, have fun with a
short writing prompt to then share with classmates to analyze and give feedback
to the writer.

programs.name: Knitting
programs.description: Participants in this program will learn the basics of knitting and the techniques involved.

programs.name: Drawing and Painting
programs.description: Explore your creativity through pencils, pastels, acrylic paint and watercolours. Learn about and practice skills including sketching, shading, brush strokes, use of colour and texture.

programs.name: Games
programs.description: From active to interactive and simple to strategic, games are a great way to gain new skills. In chess, a two-player game where game pieces are used to move across the board with the object to checkmate your opponent, you will learn patience, tactics and critical thinking as well as game rules.

programs.name: Gymnastics
programs.description: Flexibility, strength, coordination and balance, gymnastics has it all. With a focus on fun and safety, you will learn and practice basic skills such as walks, jumps, rolls and turns on various apparatuses.

programs.name: Gymnastics
programs.description: Flexibility, strength, coordination and balance, gymnastics has it all. With a focus on fun and safety, you will learn and practice basic skills such as walks, jumps, rolls and turns on various apparatuses.

programs.name: Gymnastics - Advanced
programs.description: Flexibility, strength, coordination and balance, gymnastics has it all. With a focus on strength training and technique, you will work on front handsprings, safe dismounts and how to connect movements to create tumbling passes on various apparatuses. Prerequisite: Gymnastics (Intermediate).
programs.location: Joseph J. Piccininni Cmty Rec Centre

programs.name: Karate - Beginner
programs.description: This activity introduces you to martial arts.  Here you will develop fundamental martial art skills, simple sparring skills, tactical concepts, show willingness to engage in a variety of sport activities and have confidence to try new skills.

programs.name: Karate - Beginner
programs.description: Learn the fundamentals of competition and perform simple sparring skills while demonstrating exemplary etiquette. Participants in this program should be able to perform fundamental martial art skills and martial-art specific skills.

programs.name: Knitting
programs.description: Keep your hands moving with knitting. Learn how to hold and use knitting needles, to cast on and off, knit and purl and following a pattern create your very own project.

programs.name: Abstract & Surreal Landscapes
programs.description: Move  beyond traditional depictions of nature and explore more abstract, expressive  approaches to landscape. Through painting, drawing, and sketching, discover how  colour, shape and composition can capture the spirit and emotion of a place  rather than its literal form. Experiment with layering, mark-making and dynamic  brushwork to translate the emotional and atmospheric qualities of the natural  world into an abstract visual language.

programs.name: Abstract Acrylic Painting: Composition
programs.description: Express yourself with paint with a focus on abstract composition. Experiment with novel ways of applying acrylic paint on canvas, such as squeegee paint, drip and splatter, flow painting and mixed media collage. Delve into the history of abstract painting, and the elements and principles of composition. Beginners and Intermediate welcome. Materials list will be provided.

programs.name: A Journey from Acrylics to Oils
programs.description: This introductory–intermediate course is for beginners and experienced painters who want to explore oil painting using water-mixable oils. Often seen as intimidating or toxic, oil painting becomes safe and accessible in this class. Students will learn layering, glazing, and composition while building confidence and personal expression.

programs.name: Abstract & Surreal Landscapes
programs.description: Move  beyond traditional depictions of nature and explore more abstract, expressive  approaches to landscape. Through painting, drawing, and sketching, discover how  colour, shape and composition can capture the spirit and emotion of a place  rather than its literal form. Experiment with layering, mark-making and dynamic  brushwork to translate the emotional and atmospheric qualities of the natural  world into an abstract visual language.

programs.name: Abstract Acrylic Painting: Composition
programs.description: Express yourself with paint with a focus on abstract composition. Experiment with novel ways of applying acrylic paint on canvas, such as squeegee paint, drip and splatter, flow painting and mixed media collage. Delve into the history of abstract painting, and the elements and principles of composition. Beginners and Intermediate welcome. Materials list will be provided.

Experiment with layering, mark-making and dynamic  brushwork to translate the emotional and atmospheric qualities of the natural  world into an abstract visual language.

programs.name: A Journey from Acrylics to Oils
programs.description: This introductory–intermediate course is for beginners and experienced painters who want to explore oil painting using water-mixable oils. Often seen as intimidating or toxic, oil painting becomes safe and accessible in this class. Students will learn layering, glazing, and composition while building confidence and personal expression.

programs.name: Abstract & Surreal Landscapes
programs.description: Move  beyond traditional depictions of nature and explore more abstract, expressive  approaches to landscape. Through painting, drawing, and sketching, discover how  colour, shape and composition can capture the spirit and emotion of a place  rather than its literal form. Experiment with layering, mark-making and dynamic  brushwork to translate the emotional and atmospheric qualities of the natural  world into an abstract visual language.

programs.name: Abstract Acrylic Painting: Composition
programs.description: Express yourself with paint with a focus on abstract composition. Experiment with novel ways of applying acrylic paint on canvas, such as squeegee paint, drip and splatter, flow painting and mixed media collage. Delve into the history of abstract painting, and the elements and principles of composition. Beginners and Intermediate welcome. Materials list will be provided.

programs.description: Jump in and get your feet wet. Develop entering and exiting the pool, bobbing, and floating without assistance. Learn front swim. programs.name: Preschool Swim 2: Stingray
programs.description: Jump in and get your feet wet. Develop entering and exiting the pool, bobbing, and floating without assistance. Learn front swim. programs.name: Preschool Swim 3: Otter
programs.description: Jump in and get your feet wet. Develop front and back swim. Learn side glides, sculling and staying afloat in deep water. Work towards a continuous swim of five metres. Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Guardian Swim 2.

programs.name: Preschool Swim 4: Dolphin
programs.description: Jump in and get your feet wet. Develop front and back swim and sidekick. Learn how to jump into deep water. Work towards a continuous swim of 10 metres.Prerequisite: Successful completion of or skill ability equal to Preschool Swim 3.

programs.name: Preschool Swim 4: Dolphin

programs.name: A Journey from Acrylics to Oils
programs.description: This introductory–intermediate course is for beginners and experienced painters who want to explore oil painting using water-mixable oils. Often seen as intimidating or toxic, oil painting becomes safe and accessible in this class. Students will learn layering, glazing, and composition while building confidence and personal expression.

programs.name: Abstract & Surreal Landscapes
programs.description: Move  beyond traditional depictions of nature and explore more abstract, expressive  approaches to landscape. Through painting, drawing, and sketching, discover how  colour, shape and composition can capture the spirit and emotion of a place  rather than its literal form. Experiment with layering, mark-making and dynamic  brushwork to translate the emotional and atmospheric qualities of the natural  world into an abstract visual language.

programs.name: Abstract Acrylic Painting: Composition
programs.description: Express yourself with paint with a focus on abstract composition. Experiment with novel ways of applying acrylic paint on canvas, such as squeegee paint, drip and splatter, flow painting and mixed media collage. Delve into the history of abstract painting, and the elements and principles of composition. Beginners and Intermediate welcome. Materials list will be provided.
